gxepd2_setup.message0: initialize e-paper %1 panel %2 CS %3 DC %4 RST %5 BUSY %6 serial %7 reset %8 initial refresh %9 reset pulldown %10
gxepd2_setup.tooltip: Create and initialize a GxEPD2 e-paper display object.

gxepd2_page_update.tooltip: Refresh the e-paper display with GxEPD2 firstPage/nextPage paged drawing.

gxepd2_clear_display.tooltip: Fill the full e-paper screen with one color and refresh it.

gxepd2_set_partial_window.message0: e-paper %1 partial window X %2 Y %3 W %4 H %5
gxepd2_set_partial_window.tooltip: Set the GxEPD2 partial update window.

gxepd2_fill_screen.tooltip: Fill the current display buffer; use inside a paged refresh block.

gxepd2_set_text_size.tooltip: Set the built-in Adafruit_GFX text scale.

gxepd2_set_font.tooltip: Set the Adafruit_GFX font used by print text blocks.

gxepd2_print.tooltip: Print text or a value at the current cursor position.

gxepd2_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw one pixel in the current buffer.

gxepd2_draw_line.message0: e-paper %1 line X1 %2 Y1 %3 X2 %4 Y2 %5 color %6
gxepd2_draw_line.tooltip: Draw a line in the current buffer.

gxepd2_draw_rect.message0: e-paper %1 rectangle X %2 Y %3 W %4 H %5 color %6 %7
gxepd2_draw_rect.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled rectangle.

gxepd2_draw_circle.message0: e-paper %1 circle X %2 Y %3 radius %4 color %5 %6
gxepd2_draw_circle.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled circle.

gxepd2_refresh.tooltip: Refresh the controller memory to the e-paper panel.

gxepd2_sleep.tooltip: Power off or hibernate the e-paper display.

gxepd2_width.tooltip: Get the current display width after rotation.

gxepd2_height.tooltip: Get the current display height after rotation.

gxepd2_u8g2_begin.tooltip: Initialize the U8g2 Chinese font engine and bind it to the ink screen (the entire program can be used once)

gxepd2_u8g2_font.tooltip: Set text font (for Chinese, use Wenquanyi wqy font)

gxepd2_u8g2_color.tooltip: Set text foreground and background colors

gxepd2_u8g2_mode.tooltip: Transparent only draws text; solid will fill in the background color (white text on black background/white text on red background needs to be solid)

gxepd2_u8g2_text.message0: Chinese text displayed in X %1 Y %2 %3
gxepd2_u8g2_text.tooltip: Display text at specified coordinates (supports Chinese UTF-8); the coordinate is the baseline of the lower left corner of the text

gxepd2_spi_pins.message0: Remap SPI pins SCK %1 MISO %2 MOSI %3 CS %4
gxepd2_spi_pins.tooltip: Custom SPI pin (for ESP32 / ESP32-C3); placed after "Initialize Ink Screen". The ink screen does not require MISO, you can just fill in a blank.
